user.title: Google Assistant (Manual)
user.description:
Enter your Google Cloud Platform project ID.

Follow the official manual setup guide at {guide_url} (up to and including step 13 — stop before the YAML configuration section). You will need:

1. A GCP project with the Google Assistant API enabled
2. A service account with the correct permissions

If you already have google_assistant: configured in your configuration.yaml, those settings will be ignored — this integration replaces YAML configuration entirely.

You'll paste the service account JSON key in the next step.

data_description.project_id: The GCP project ID where your Google Actions project lives

service_account.title: Service Account
service_account.description:
Paste the entire contents of the downloaded JSON key file for your service account. You can create one at {docs_url}.

This is step 12 from the guide at {guide_url}.

data_description.service_account: Paste the entire contents of the downloaded JSON key file

error.invalid_project_id: Project ID must be 6-30 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens
error.Invalid JSON: The text is not valid JSON
error.Missing 'client_email': The JSON is missing the 'client_email' field
error.Missing 'private_key': The JSON is missing the 'private_key' field
